title: orchis × apollinaris
intro: Orchis × apollinaris is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Orchis mascula and Orchis italica. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain anti-inflammatory compounds that may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and gout. The health benefits of Orchis × apollinaris include its potential to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its possible role in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the roots of Orchis × apollinaris are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
